records.ety: [L. squamosus, fr. squama a scale: cf. F. squameux.]

defs: Covered with, or consisting of, scales; resembling a scale; scaly; as, the squamose cones of the pine; squamous epithelial cells; the squamous portion of the temporal bone, which is so called from a fancied resemblance to a scale.
Of or pertaining to the squamosal bone; squamosal.
